    background: '#1E5F99',

    border: 'none',
    borderRadius: '6px',
    cursor: 'pointer',
    fontSize: '12px',
    fontWeight: '600',
    transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
    boxShadow: '0 2px 8px rgba(110, 250, 251, 0.3)'
  },

    background: '#bdc3c7',

    padding: '8px 16px',

    cursor: 'not-allowed',
    fontSize: '12px',
    fontWeight: '600',
    transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
    boxShadow: 'none'
  },
  container: {
    minHeight: '100vh',
    backgroundColor: 'white',
    padding: '10px',

    position: 'relative'
  },
  header: {
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: '15px',

    padding: '12px',
    borderRadius: '8px',
    boxShadow: '0 2px 8px rgba(46, 134, 171, 0.3)'
  },
  headerTitle: {
    color: 'white',
    margin: '0',
    fontSize: '1.5rem',
    fontWeight: '700',
    display: 'flex',
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    gap: '15px',
    textShadow: '0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
  },
  section: {
    marginBottom: '20px',
    padding: '15px',
    backgroundColor: '#f8f9fa',
    borderRadius: '8px',
    boxShadow: '0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)',
    border: '1px solid #e9ecef'
  },
  sectionTitle: {
    margin: '0 0 10px 0',
    color: '#2c3e50',
    fontSize: '1rem',
    fontWeight: '600',
    display: 'flex',
    alignItems: 'center',
    gap: '8px'
  },
  backgroundPattern: {
    position: 'absolute',
    top: 0,
    left: 0,
    right: 0,
    bottom: 0,
    opacity: 0.08,
    zIndex: 0,
    pointerEvents: 'none',
    overflow: 'hidden'
  }
};

sourcesContent:
// Shared style constants
export const STYLES = {
  button: {
    background: '#1E5F99',
    color: 'white',
    padding: '8px 16px',
    border: 'none',
    borderRadius: '6px',
    cursor: 'pointer',
    fontSize: '12px',
    fontWeight: '600',
    transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
    boxShadow: '0 2px 8px rgba(110, 250, 251, 0.3)'
  },
  
  disabledButton: {
    background: '#bdc3c7',
    color: 'white',
    padding: '8px 16px',
    border: 'none',
    borderRadius: '6px',
    cursor: 'not-allowed',
    fontSize: '12px',
    fontWeight: '600',
    transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
    boxShadow: 'none'
  },

  container: {
    minHeight: '100vh',
    backgroundColor: 'white',
    padding: '10px',
    fontFamily: "'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif",
    position: 'relative'
  },

  header: {
    textAlign: 'center',
    marginBottom: '15px',
    background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #6EFAFB 0%, #1E5F99 100%)',
    padding: '12px',
    borderRadius: '8px',
    boxShadow: '0 2px 8px rgba(46, 134, 171, 0.3)'
  },

  headerTitle: {
    color: 'white',
    margin: '0',
    fontSize: '1.5rem',
    fontWeight: '700',
    display: 'flex',
    alignItems: 'center',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    gap: '15px',
    textShadow: '0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'
  },

  section: {
    marginBottom: '20px',
    padding: '15px',
    backgroundColor: '#f8f9fa',
    borderRadius: '8px',
    boxShadow: '0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)',
    border: '1px solid #e9ecef'
  },

  sectionTitle: {
    margin: '0 0 10px 0',
    color: '#2c3e50',
    fontSize: '1rem',
    fontWeight: '600',
    display: 'flex',
    alignItems: 'center',
    gap: '8px'
  },

  backgroundPattern: {
    position: 'absolute',
    top: 0,
    left: 0,
    right: 0,
    bottom: 0,
    opacity: 0.08,
    zIndex: 0,
    pointerEvents: 'none',
    overflow: 'hidden'
  }
};
